_publications._publicationTitle: A multicenter study of neurofibromatosis type 1 utilizing deep learning for whole body tumor identification.

_contextSnippet: If we set the threshold value of accuracy rates at 0.85, 36/42 MPNST (85.71%) and 66/89 PNF (74.16%) images were correctly diagnosed. By increasing the threshold value to 0.90, 33/42 MPNST (78.57%) and 54/89 PNF (60.67%)
details: At 0.85 threshold: 36/42 MPNST (85.71%) and 66/89 PNF (74.16%) images correctly diagnosed. At 0.90 threshold: 33/42 MPNST (78.57%) and 54/89 PNF (60.67%) images accurately identified
